body: All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
The format is based on [Keep a Changelog],
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning].
Keep a Changelog: init changelog.description: Create a new Keep a Changelog file skeleton.

Keep a Changelog: full version section.description: Create a version section with all Keep a Changelog categories.

Keep a Changelog: all categories.description: Create all Keep a Changelog change categories.

Keep a Changelog: added.description: Create an Added section for new features.

Keep a Changelog: changed.description: Create a Changed section for changes in existing functionality.

Keep a Changelog: deprecated.description: Create a Deprecated section for soon-to-be removed features.

Keep a Changelog: removed.description: Create a Removed section for removed features.

Keep a Changelog: fixed.description: Create a Fixed section for bug fixes.

Keep a Changelog: security.description: Create a Security section for vulnerability notes.

Keep a Changelog: first release link.description: Create a reference link for the first release.

Keep a Changelog: compare link.description: Create a reference link comparing two releases.
